creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Anonymous <swell.k@gmail.com> writes:

> Bump snapshot to r10274.
>
>   ftp://ftp.lissyara.su/users/Guest/amule2.diff

ftp.lissyara.su is currently down and will be for a while (around month).
Besides updating distfile there were no changes compared to the first diff.
The committer can just...

  1. grab and apply the first diff (a.diff)
  2. set PORTVERSION to 10275
  3. run `make makesum'
  4. put distfile somewhere, e.g. ports/local-distfiles
  5. commit

Tested revisions: 10273-10275.
